title: Salt: Renewed
description: This is a Port of the Salt mod brought up to 1.21.1 for NeoForge.
body:
тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО ![Salt Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5c6771c4b32e3202902b851993a90150f8ad23a.png) тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО**Salt adds a food salting mechanic, as well as several other features and blocks.** ![Salt 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd848ac2a069b63e836b0b015b18419336af3da8.png) ![Salt 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5840d5366fc87a3389821810a1d9eb860debdb37.png) ![Salt 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9612fe1e813adfc1df9c75cbb9629eeff76b802a.png)
Main Description - Food can now be salted to improve the taste and add nutrition. - Salting recipe is dynamic and controlled by "salt:can_be_salted" tag: - Several mods, such as Farmer's Delight, are supported out of the box. - Nutrition value can be configured per food.
Rock Salt - Rock Salt will generate underground (sililar to ores) in dripstone caves, ocean and beach biomes. - When harvested, Rock Salt Ore will drop Raw Rock Salt, which is crafted into Salt. - Salt can be also obtained by growing Salt Crystals or by evaporating water in a cauldron.
Other features - All Salt blocks are dissolvable in water. - Salt blocks will melt adjacent ice and snow blocks. - Ice and snow can also be melted by sprinkling them with salt.
The mod is highly configurable - Tags are used for everything. - All features can be turned off in a config.
Port-only options Two opt-in toggles in `salt-common.toml` under `[PortTweaks]`: - `BumpSpawnDensity` (default `false`) тАФ ~4 deposits per qualifying chunk instead of upstream's ~1 per 8 chunks - `SaltBlockGravity` (default `false`) тАФ Salt Block falls like sand
